
### exercise: forwarding paths (2)  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq},
} -->
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/forwardPathsEx2.figure.svg)
 

* in subq, %r8 is \\rule{3cm2pt} addq.
* in subq, %r9 is \\rule{3cm2pt} addq.
* in andq, %r9 is \\rule{3cm2pt} subq.
* in andq, %r9 is \\rule{3cm2pt} addq. 

   * A: not forwarded from
   * B-D: forwarded to decode from {execute,memory,writeback} stage of
